name: Calendar Triangulation
summary: Successfully implemented calendar triangulation module with matching logic, confidence scoring, and attendee extraction

tasks.notes: Implemented complete calendar matching module with CLI interface and programmatic functions
Ready for use_app_google_calendar integration with proper time window queries (±2 hours around meeting)
Implemented three matching methods: timestamp+title (best), title_only, timestamp_only with confidence scoring
Multi-factor scoring: time match (40%), title similarity (30%), attendees presence (15%), method adjustments
Extracts all attendee emails from matched calendar events for CRM lookup integration

acceptance_criteria.calendar_query_works: ✅ Calendar query structure implemented for use_app_google_calendar integration
acceptance_criteria.fuzzy_timestamps_handled: ✅ ±30 minute tolerance for timestamp matching with timezone handling
acceptance_criteria.confidence_score_calculated: ✅ Multi-factor confidence scoring (0.0-1.0) with method-based adjustments
acceptance_criteria.attendees_extracted: ✅ Attendee emails extracted and returned for CRM integration

matching_algorithm.time_window: ±2 hours around meeting time for calendar query

confidence_weights.method_bonus: Up to 10% for high-confidence timestamp+title matches

output_format.manifest_schema: Compliant with manifest-v3 calendar_match field (event_id, confidence, method)
output_format.extra_data: Returns attendee_emails array for CRM lookup (not stored in manifest)

test_results.basic_functionality: ✅ CLI interface works with manifest input
test_results.timezone_handling: ✅ Correctly handles UTC meeting times and EST calendar events
test_results.title_matching: ✅ String similarity matching with confidence scoring

dependencies_satisfied: D2.1 - Manifest v3 schema with calendar_match field structure
next_steps: Module ready for integration into meeting processing pipeline. Calendar API calls will work when use_app_google_calendar tool is available in runtime environment.
